siteDescription: An interactive, step-by-step introduction to the fundamentals of sound synthesis: waveforms, envelopes, filters, modulation and more.

lessons.title: What is sound?
lessons.description: Learn what sound is: frequency and amplitude explained with a live oscillator, oscilloscope and spectrum analyzer you can play in the browser.

lessons.title: Waveforms
lessons.description: Hear and see how sine, square, sawtooth and triangle waves differ — harmonics, timbre and tone colour explained interactively.

lessons.title: Pitch & frequency
lessons.description: How musical notes map to frequency in hertz: octaves, semitones and A440, explored on an interactive keyboard.

lessons.title: Wave Builder
lessons.description: Build your own waveform from sine harmonics — an interactive introduction to additive synthesis and wavetables.

lessons.title: Envelopes (ADSR)
lessons.description: ADSR envelopes explained: attack, decay, sustain and release, with an interactive envelope you can shape and hear.

lessons.title: Filters & EQ
lessons.description: Low-pass, high-pass and band-pass filters explained: sweep cutoff and resonance on a live sawtooth and hear subtractive synthesis at work.

lessons.title: Modulation
lessons.description: LFOs, vibrato, tremolo and FM synthesis: use one oscillator to modulate another and hear entirely new tones emerge.

lessons.title: Noise & percussion
lessons.description: Synthesize drums from scratch: kick, snare and hi-hats built from noise, filters and envelopes — playable in the browser.

lessons.title: Synth Lab
lessons.description: A playable subtractive synthesizer in the browser: oscillator, filter, ADSR envelope and vibrato LFO wired into one signal chain.

lessons.title: Delay & feedback
lessons.description: Delay and feedback explained: build echoes, slapback and self-oscillating feedback loops with an interactive delay effect.

lessons.title: Chorus & flanger
lessons.description: Chorus and flanger are one modulated delay: hear how LFO depth, base delay and feedback create shimmer and jet-engine sweeps.

lessons.title: Distortion
lessons.description: Distortion and waveshaping explained: watch clipping create new harmonics from a pure sine wave, live in the browser.

lessons.title: Reverb
lessons.description: Convolution reverb explained: impulse responses, room size and decay, with an interactive reverb you can tweak in real time.

lessons.title: FX Rack
lessons.description: Chain delay, chorus, distortion and reverb into a pedalboard — reorder the effects and hear why signal order matters.

lessons.title: Signal Chain
lessons.description: A semi-modular synth in the browser: reorder the signal chain and patch an LFO to pitch, cutoff, volume or delay time.
